text_lines: Principal Recruiter | Empowering Capital One’s Next Generation of Tech Leadership

Ready to build the future of fintech? 🚀 Capital One is #hiring a Principal Fullstack Engineer in Bangalore! We aren’t just a bank; we’re a tech company disruptor. Why us? Modern Stack: Lead with Go, Java, TypeScript, and AWS. Tech First: Drive architectural decisions and mentor elite pods. Scale: Build resilient, high-concurrency systems for millions. Join a culture that values engineering excellence and bold innovation. Apply now & complete the coding challenge to get in touch. Goodluck! #Capit
Principal Associate - Software Engineering (Verified job) Principal Associate - Software Engineering
MBA Graduate | Recruiter and Operations at Talganize Private Limited

Position: Go backend engineer. Location: Hyderabad (Hybrid). Exp: 8+ yrs. Employment Type: Full-Time. Please share your resumes at jason@talganize.com Please check jd: We’re looking for a strong Golang Backend Engineer to build a high-performance, developer-first Email API platform. This is a core backend role focused on scalability, reliability, and system design—not UI or low-code work. 🔹 Work on APIs, email pipelines, queues & distributed systems. 🔹 Tech: Go, Kafka/RabbitMQ, PostgreSQL/MySQL.

Connect
My Team in
SMC Group
is hiring a MTS 3 – Backend Golang Engineer to join our team in Delhi.
Experience: 5+ years with Go as your primary language.
What you'll own:
→ Design and build high-performance, low-latency services in Go
→ Solve last-mile latency bottlenecks in production systems handling massive volume while systems are running.
→ Architect and scale microservices from the ground up
→ Debug CPU, memory, and concurrency issues at depth
What you bring:
• Experience with WebSockets and real-time broadcasting
• Deep expertise in Go concurrency — goroutines, channels, sync primitives
• Proven track record building low-latency, high-throughput systems
• Strong system design fundamentals — caching, load balancing, queues
• Solid DSA foundations and a passion for clean, testable code
Bonus if you've worked on price broadcasting, market data feeds 🚀
Why this role? You won't be shipping CRUD APIs. You'll be engineering systems where every millisecond matters — with full ownership from design to production.
Ready to apply? Drop your details here:
https://lnkd.in/gVy5m7rw
Tag someone who lives and breathes Go. 🔥

🚀 Engineering is More Than a Degree — It’s a Mindset
Engineering professionals are the backbone of innovation, efficiency, and progress in every industry. From designing smarter systems to optimizing production processes, engineers transform ideas into real-world solutions every single day.
In today’s fast-evolving landscape, technical knowledge alone isn’t enough. The most successful engineering professionals continuously focus on:
🔧 Upskilling in emerging technologies
📊 Improving problem-solving and analytical thinking
🤝 Collaborating across multidisciplinary teams
📈 Adapting to new tools, standards, and industry demands
Whether you're a student, fresher, or experienced engineer, investing in continuous learning is the key to staying relevant and competitive in the industry.
At EVERYENG, we see firsthand how the right guidance, practical training, and mentorship can accelerate an engineer’s career journey.
💡 Remember: Great engineers don’t just build machines — they build the future.

🚀 Exciting Opportunity for Golang Experts!
We’re looking for a Golang Architect (Hands-on) to join a dynamic team building high-throughput, resilient integration solutions. If you’re passionate about designing scalable systems and working with cutting-edge technologies, this role is for you.
📍 Location: Remote (Miami-based team)
📄 Type: Contract
💡 What You’ll Do:
• Architect and build robust microservices, APIs, and event-driven systems using Go
• Define enterprise integration patterns (REST, gRPC, messaging, event sourcing)
• Drive API lifecycle management and best practices
• Collaborate across teams to translate business needs into scalable solutions
• Mentor engineers and lead technical excellence in Go
🔧 Tech Stack Highlights:
Go | Kafka | NATS | RabbitMQ | Docker | Kubernetes | AWS | Terraform | CI/CD
🎯 What We’re Looking For:
• 8+ years in software engineering, with strong Go expertise
• Deep understanding of concurrency, channels, and scalable API design
• Experience with cloud-native architectures and event-driven systems
• Strong grasp of security (OAuth2, OIDC, mTLS)
If you’re ready to take ownership, drive innovation, and make an impact—let’s connect!
